red_test.reason: node records corrected origin/main metrics without mutating the dirty Mission checkout

targeted_test.command: go test ./... -count=1 in detached ao-mission origin/main worktree
targeted_test.output: Corrected origin/main full Mission Go test suite passed

integration_test.command: go test ./internal/mission -run TestReturnGateDoesNotCountHandoffStepsAsCompletedNodes -count=1 in detached ao-mission origin/main worktree
integration_test.output: Handoff-only continuation steps do not count as completed evidence nodes

local_snapshot_test.output: Dirty local Mission checkout test suite passed, but local HEAD is five commits behind origin/main and is not the corrected metric source

source_boundary_test.command: git show origin/main:internal/mission/supervisor.go; compare local HEAD and origin/main
source_boundary_test.output: origin/main uses completed=0 before evidence projections; local HEAD still initializes completed from len(r.Steps)

objective: Coordinate ao-mission Mission metrics recompute after handoff correction through a bounded Atlas compatibility evidence node with no promotion.
